CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 10.0, 5.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (2, 20.0, 10.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (3, NULL, 15.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (4, 30.0, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (5, NULL, NULL);
SELECT REGR_SXX(value1, value2) FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL AND value2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, REGR_SXX(value1, value2) OVER (PARTITION BY id) FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (extra_id INT, extra_value FLOAT);
SELECT a.extra_id, REGR_SXX(t.value1, t.value2) FROM test_data t JOIN additional_data a ON t.id = a.extra_id GROUP BY a.extra_id;
SELECT REGR_SXX(SUBQUERY.value1, SUBQUERY.value2) FROM (SELECT value1, value2 FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL AND value2 IS NOT NULL) AS SUBQUERY;
SELECT REGR_SXX(t.value1, t.value2) FROM test_data t WHERE t.id IN (SELECT extra_id FROM additional_data);
